answers.intake_q1: When did your back pain start?
answers.intake_q2: Can you describe where exactly your back pain is located?
answers.intake_q3: Any recent injury or trauma to your back or ribs?
answers.intake_q4: Any fever, chills, or unexplained weight loss since the pain started?
answers.intake_q5: Any difficulty breathing, coughing, or chest pain along with the back pain?
answers.intake_q6: Any numbness, weakness, or tingling in your legs or feet?
answers.intake_q7: Any history of kidney problems, urinary symptoms, or recent infections?
answers.intake_q8: Have you tried any treatments or medications for your back pain, and if so, what and did they help?
answers.intake_a8: I tried tylenol but it didn't really help much
answers.intake_q9: Any recent activities or movements that seemed to trigger or worsen the pain?
answers.intake_a9: poor posture and leaning against the area when sitting worsen the pain
answers.intake_q10: Any history of osteoporosis, cancer, or recent unexplained fractures?
